channel.title: Word on yexca'Blog

item.title: Inserting Code with Syntax Highlighting in Microsoft Word
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview

Introduction (The Fluff)

Sometimes you need to insert code into a Word document. Simply pasting it looks messy, and the lack of syntax highlighting makes it a pain to read.

Tool 1

CodeInWord - Elegant code display/highlighting/insertion/formatting in Word

Tool 2

Syntax Highlight Code In Microsoft Word

Instructions

It’s straightforward: paste your code, select the language, click generate, and copy the result into Word.
